textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Small pile of 5-7 human skulls heaped on a stone floor, some cracked and broken, some with jawbones missing, arranged in a casual heap as if discarded, pale yellowed bone with dark eye sockets, a few loose vertebrae and finger bones scattered around the base, dark fantasy dungeon game prop, isolated object, dark background
